title: Unlimited Combination Enchantment (UCE)
description: Make enchantments can be combined without limits
body:
**The mod allows you to combine all the enchantments in Minecraft into one item without fear of going "Too Expensive"**

---------

<center>

![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/83898a7bebc20752557d528c6670ebdbcd7d2e02.png)

![ps](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/22bc3b74a095f1860e0c826130a5b775016e49b3.png)
 
### Extract Enchantment

**You can extract enchantment from enchanted item with book and it will become enchanted book**

![ekstrak](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/06f5d6e64bc3cbe34d5e21be57c63e076c9e713f.gif)

### Unlimited Combination Enchantment

**You can combine all enchantments in one item.**

![combine](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8ac4480bccd97f71bc5a5b73d89f013a5d13181b.gif)

![ps](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/22bc3b74a095f1860e0c826130a5b775016e49b3.png)

<details>
  <summary>Bonus Features</summary>

### Treasure Enchantments

**Add Treasure Enchantments inside the enchanting infuser**

![EI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e1e199142f6c58d52b3964213b3b971049a0c796.gif)

</details>

**I recommend you to use mod called [Enchanting Infuser](https://modrinth.com/mod/enchanting-infuser) to make this mod more useful**

</center>
